texto: I was thinking of murder, mutilation and dessert like Ignacia Sandoval’s instructions for delectable empanadas made of minced mother-in-law’s tongue (said to induce peace and harmony in your household), or the gonads of your cheating husband (a savory dish to add spice to your lovemaking).
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sandra Ramos O'Briant: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “I was thinking of murder, mutilation and dessert like Ignacia Sandoval’s instructions for delecta…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, adultery, dessert pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dessert e mother-in-law.
